name: Broughton Recreation Center
description: Broughton Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Longview, TX. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.
address: 801 S Martin Luther King Jr Blvd

name: Crossing Creeks Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Crossing Creeks Country Club in Longview, TX! There are 12 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Guthrie Park
description: Guthrie Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Longview, TX. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights.

name: KC Excel Health Club at the Parks Fitness Center
description: Come play pickleball at KC Excel Health Club at the Parks Fitness Center in Kilgore, TX! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Paula Martin Jones Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Paula Martin Jones Recreation Center in Longview, TX! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Stafford Wellness Center
description: Come play pickleball at Stafford Wellness Center in Longview, TX! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.
